description: Leadview.io identifies the companies visiting your website in real time, surfacing key decision-makers so sales teams can act on warm traffic immediately.
tagline: Tracks business visitors, delivers real-time leads
overview: Leadview.io turns anonymous website traffic into actionable sales leads by revealing the companies behind each visit along with relevant decision-maker contacts. A lightweight code snippet is all that is needed to get started, and the platform integrates with popular CRM tools to feed identified prospects directly into existing sales workflows.
what_is: Leadview is a lead identification platform that shows sales and marketing teams exactly which companies are visiting their website. It sits within the sales intelligence category, converting anonymous web traffic into named prospects with contact details for key decision-makers. The core advantage is the ability to act on warm interest that would otherwise go unnoticed, targeting companies that have already demonstrated intent by visiting the site.

Getting started with Leadview involves three steps: booking a demo, adding a short code snippet to the site, and beginning to capture leads. Identified companies and contacts become visible as soon as the tracker is active, giving teams immediate visibility into who is engaging with their content. The platform is particularly useful for generating pipeline from inbound traffic without waiting for visitors to fill out a form.

Leadview connects with widely used CRM platforms, enriching existing sales records and supporting workflow automation. It is not a full marketing automation suite or email campaign manager. Its scope is focused on visitor identification and contact delivery, making it a strong complementary tool for teams that already have outreach infrastructure in place and want sharper lead intelligence.
